mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.category_id, c.name AS category_name, c.parent_id AS parent_category_id, p.name AS parent_category_name, r.type, r.amount, r.remark, r.record_date, r.create_time FROM record r LEFT JOIN category c ON r.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN category p ON c.parent_id = p.id
ORDER BY r.record_date DESC, r.id DESC LIMIT #{q.offset}, #{q.limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO record (user_id, category_id, type, amount, remark, record_date, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{remark}, #{recordDate}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM record WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
